title: Altered mental status red flags
required_observations: head injury or toxin exposure report
red_flags: new confusion or altered mental status
altered mental status after injury, toxin exposure, fever, or breathing concern
escalation_criteria: New altered mental status, unresponsiveness, or seizure requires emergency escalation according to local protocol.
If the person cannot provide reliable history, treat missing information as important for handoff rather than reassurance.
local_actions: Document baseline if known, current alertness, timeline, associated symptoms, and vital signs for handoff.
Keep the person under direct observation while escalation is arranged.
forbidden_actions: Do not diagnose the cause of altered mental status.
Do not provide medication, dosing, restraint, or procedure instructions unless a local clinician or protocol explicitly provides them.
safety_boundary: Prototype protocol navigation card for trained-responder review only. It is not a clinical guideline and cannot diagnose, prescribe, dose, triage autonomously, or override local protocol.
source_note: Prototype protocol card derived from public guideline concepts. Not a clinical guideline.
